mapper.insert:
insert into exam_answer (record_id, question_id, student_answer, score, create_time) values
(#{item.recordId}, #{item.questionId}, #{item.studentAnswer}, #{item.score}, now())
mapper.update:
update exam_answer set score = CASE
WHEN record_id = #{item.recordId} AND question_id = #{item.questionId} THEN #{item.score}
ELSE score END, update_time = now() where (record_id, question_id) in
(#{item.recordId}, #{item.questionId})
mapper.select: select a.record_id, a.question_id, a.student_answer, a.score, a.create_time, a.update_time, q.question_content, q.correct_answer, q.options, t.type_name, t.is_auto_graded, CASE WHEN pq.exam_id IS NOT NULL THEN pq.points WHEN aq.assignment_id IS NOT NULL THEN aq.points ELSE 0 END as points from exam_answer a inner join exam_question_bank q on a.question_id = q.question_id left join exam_question_type t on q.question_type_id = t.type_id left join exam_record r on a.record_id = r.record_id left join exam_paper_question pq on pq.exam_id = r.exam_id and pq.question_id = a.question_id left join exam_assignment_question aq on aq.assignment_id = r.exam_id and aq.question_id = a.question_id where a.record_id = #{recordId} order by CASE WHEN pq.exam_id IS NOT NULL THEN pq.question_order WHEN aq.assignment_id IS NOT NULL THEN aq.question_order ELSE 0 END
